description: Composition Red polo T-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, has a ribbed spread collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, embroidered branding on the left chest, half buttoned placket and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold inside out with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry normal Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Don that sporty look with ease with this T-shirt from timberland. Crafted from soft organic cotton and designed for style, this tee offers exemplary comfort and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Team it with jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
